title: Multi-scale FWI Algorithm Guidance
summary: Use staged frequency bands, conservative step lengths, and loss-curve checks to make FWI planning reproducible.
assumptions: shots, wavelet, and initial model are registered to the same grid
dry-run job rendering is used before any real execution backend exists

parameter_advice.frequency_band: Use the lowest reliable frequency band first, then move upward in small stages.
parameter_advice.step_length: Start conservatively and inspect loss reduction before increasing step length.
parameter_advice.regularization: Use stronger smoothing when gradients are unstable or the starting model is rough.
